Name: Falling Branch
Description: A heavy branch falls from the forest canopy, stunning all combatants

Name: Thorn Vines
Description: Thorny vines entangle and slow all combatants

Name: Lava Splash
Description: Molten lava splashes from nearby flows, burning all combatants

Name: Steam Burst
Description: Scalding steam erupts from the ground, weakening all combatants

Name: Rising Dead
Description: Undead hands from the graveyard grab and slow all combatants

Name: Ancient Curse
Description: Ancient magic from the ruins weakens all who disturb them

Name: Ancient Curse
Description: Ancient chamber curse weakens all who enter
